steps.title: Substitute $x=0$
steps.content: The function is $g(x)=-x+8$. Evaluate it at $0$: $$g(0)=-(0)+8.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The requested value is the output $g(0)=8$, not the input $0$. A negative value uses the wrong sign, and a value not produced by substituting $0$ into $g(x)=-x+8$ is eliminated.
